scripts.dev: concurrently -c "#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fb7185,#86efac" -n api,queue,logs,frontend "php backend/artisan serve --host=127.0.0.1 --port=8000" "php backend/artisan queue:listen --tries=1 --timeout=0" "php backend/artisan pail --timeout=0" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" --kill-others
